task_description: Security monitoring flagged username asmith for anomalous concurrent out-of-zone logins. The account is u101, Alice Smith, email asmith@corp.com, status active. Active sessions are s1001, s1002, and s1003. You must secure the account and prevent further breaches. Choose exactly one option. Option A: identify the user, retrieve and review active sessions, terminate the specific flagged sessions one by one, then set the account to inactive. Option B: identify the user, immediately set the account to deactivated, then bulk terminate all sessions for the user to end the threat decisively. Answer with only A or B, followed by a brief reason.
